name: Laos
plugDescriptions: Type A — Two flat parallel pins (North American/Japanese style)
Type B — Two flat parallel pins + grounding pin (North American style)
Type C — Two round pins (Europlug, most common worldwide)
Type E — Two round pins + grounding pin hole (French style)
Type F — Two round pins + grounding clips (Schuko, German style)
adapterNotes: Multiple plug types at 230V. Bring a universal adapter.
